codeReview.summary: The commit correctly integrates PopoverQuickSwitchView into MenuBarPopoverView between the provider/Hermes section and the action bar, making popover quick-switch actions reachable in product UI.

issues.description: SwitcherPopoverUITests still do not reference MenuBarPopoverView/PopoverQuickSwitchView directly, so integration-path evidence remains indirect (commit inspection + passing store/service tests) rather than explicit view-composition assertions.
